overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through Night City during golden hour. The player moves from a commercial street with a distinctive blue warehouse, approaches and passes beneath a massive megabuilding marked with '12', then transitions into an industrial zone featuring large spherical storage tanks while facing the setting sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with warehouse buildings and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the city street toward the intersection with the setting sun ahead

entered.detail: large industrial building covered in colorful graffiti murals and street art
tall palm trees lining both sides of the street avenue
raised highway structure visible in the distance against the skyline
sleek black and red sports car parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sun-drenched commercial street in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward past a blue warehouse building covered in vibrant graffiti, with palm trees lining the avenue and an elevated highway visible in the distance against the golden hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: megabuilding approach with palm tree boulevard

events.description: camera tilts dramatically upward to reveal the massive scale of the megabuilding marked with '12'

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the towering megabuilding ahead, craning to see its full height

entered.detail: massive towering structure with large white '12' signage on its facade, featuring red and beige paneling
pedestrian bridge connecting to the main building structure

segments.scene_description: As the camera approaches the massive megabuilding, it tilts upward to emphasize the structure's imposing height. The building marked '12' dominates the skyline with its futuristic architecture, while palm trees frame the approach on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial plaza beneath megabuilding with neon storefronts

events.description: passes under the overhanging structure of megabuilding 12 into the covered plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza beneath the megabuilding, navigating between pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and white top walking toward the camera
pedestrian in dark clothing walking up the concrete stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up into the megabuilding interior
bright pink neon sign for 'BOOHEMIA' shop
orange neon sign reading 'FOODSCAPE' above a storefront
massive concrete columns holding up the megabuilding structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath the massive overhanging structure of building 12 into a semi-covered commercial plaza. Neon signs for 'BOOHEMIA' and 'FOODSCAPE' illuminate the area as pedestrians walk through the space, and a wide concrete staircase leads upward into the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway transition to industrial zone

events.description: enters darker covered roadway section with fluorescent overhead lighting
exits the covered area revealing the industrial zone with large spherical tanks ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the transition corridor toward the industrial area with the sun visible ahead

entered.detail: tunnel-like structure with fluorescent tube lighting covering the road
massive spherical storage tanks with industrial markings visible in the distance
tall concrete walls lining both sides of the roadway

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through a covered roadway section with artificial lighting, transitioning from the commercial plaza to an industrial zone. As the camera emerges, massive spherical industrial tanks become visible ahead against the bright setting sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor between spherical storage tanks

events.description: intense lens flare from setting sun as camera faces directly toward the bright light

agents.ego_description: walking up the industrial road directly toward the setting sun between the massive spherical tanks

entered.detail: industrial pipe bridge and scaffolding structure on the left side

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving through an industrial corridor flanked by massive spherical storage tanks on both sides. The setting sun creates intense lens flare directly ahead as the camera approaches the end of the road, with industrial pipelines visible along the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched commercial avenue into the shadowed depths of a megastructure, finally emerging into a blinding industrial zone. It begins by gliding past a graffiti-covered blue warehouse and palm trees under a golden hour sky, before tilting upward to reveal the imposing height of a massive building marked with the number 12. The camera then moves beneath this overhanging structure into a semi-covered plaza illuminated by neon signs for Boohemia and Foodscape, passing pedestrians and a wide concrete staircase. As the view transitions through a covered roadway with artificial lighting, the scene opens up into an industrial corridor flanked by massive spherical storage tanks. The movement concludes by heading directly toward the setting sun, which creates an intense lens flare over a landscape of industrial pipelines.
